ItacPersonItem.Notes: According to Lohr, Latin Aristotle Commentaries, he wrote Lezioni sopra la poetica di Aristotele, and La Retorica di Aristotele, as member of the Innominati of Parma.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
